/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/test_opcodes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/__/src/Intel8080.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/__/src/Bus.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/__/src/Memory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/__/src/Opcodes_ALU.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/__/src/Opcodes_Move.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/__/src/Opcodes_System.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/__/src/Opcode_Table.cpp.o -o unit_tests  ../_deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2.a ../_deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2Main.a ../_deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2.a
